report_markdown:
# Clarity Weekly Report — Week of May 11, 2026

Zero meetings. 8 hours of open time every day. You completed 0 of 14 tasks — not one, across 4 consecutive days. That is not a scheduling problem.

**Depletion cascade (HIGH — 2 weeks running)**

April 7 gave you 14 meeting hours and broke your ability to execute Mon–Wed. This week removed the meetings entirely and the paralysis held. The trigger is gone; the response remained. 10 admin tasks and 3 overdue items sat at a load score of 40 every day Mon–Thu without anything touching them.

**Avoidance loop (HIGH — 2 weeks running)**

Last week: personal tasks rescheduled 4 times, financial tasks rescheduled 3 times — 0 completions. This week: admin took the full weight (10 tasks, 0 done, 3 overdue), work (3 tasks, 0 done), communication (1 task, 0 done). The category shifts. The mechanism does not. You read every email — unread count is 0 — then sent 1 reply all week against 99 received. Three threads asked something of you. None got answered.

**Social withdrawal (MEDIUM — 1 week)**

1 email sent. The prior week had 11 unanswered threads; this week had 3, but the drop came from fewer incoming demands, not from you resolving anything. The communication task stayed on the list. The inbox is clear because you read everything — just nothing goes back out.

**The one honest thing:** You ordered food 4 times and paid rent. You are keeping yourself alive and sidestepping every decision or response beyond that.

The root cause is two consecutive weeks of unprocessed depletion — April's 14-hour meeting load burned your reserves, and the empty week that followed did not restore them; it just made the avoidance visible.
root_cause: Two consecutive weeks of unprocessed depletion — April's meeting load burned reserves, and the free week that followed did not restore them, it just removed the excuse.
